'''chothajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:glacifluvial|glacifluvial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:glacifluvial|glacifluvial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chothajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chothajithi|chothajithi]] || [[word:chothajiji|chothajiji]] || [[word:chothajishi|chothajishi]] || [[word:chothajiki|chothajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chothajuthuthu|chothajuthuthu]] || [[word:chothajujuju|chothajujuju]] || [[word:chothajushushu|chothajushushu]] || [[word:chothajukuku|chothajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chothajuthu|chothajuthu]] || [[word:chothajuju|chothajuju]] || [[word:chothajushu|chothajushu]] || [[word:chothajuku|chothajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chothajufthuf|chothajufthuf]] || [[word:chothajufjuf|chothajufjuf]] || [[word:chothajufshuf|chothajufshuf]] || [[word:chothajufkuf|chothajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chothajethe|chothajethe]] || [[word:chothajeje|chothajeje]] || [[word:chothajeshe|chothajeshe]] || [[word:chothajeke|chothajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chothajothotho|chothajothotho]] || [[word:chothajojojo|chothajojojo]] || [[word:chothajoshosho|chothajoshosho]] || [[word:chothajokoko|chothajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chothajotho|chothajotho]] || [[word:chothajojo|chothajojo]] || [[word:chothajosho|chothajosho]] || [[word:chothajoko|chothajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chothajofthof|chothajofthof]] || [[word:chothajofjof|chothajofjof]] || [[word:chothajofshof|chothajofshof]] || [[word:chothajofkof|chothajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfthĂŻf|chothajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfjĂŻf|chothajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfshĂŻf|chothajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfkĂŻf|chothajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chothajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chothajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chothajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chothajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfthĂŻf|chothajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfjĂŻf|chothajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfshĂŻf|chothajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfkĂŻf|chothajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfthĂŻf|chothajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfjĂŻf|chothajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfshĂŻf|chothajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chothajĂŻfkĂŻf|chothajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chothajĂŠthĂŠ|chothajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chothajĂŠjĂŠ|chothajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chothajĂŠshĂŠ|chothajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chothajĂŠkĂŠ|chothajĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chothajathatha|chothajathatha]] || [[word:chothajajaja|chothajajaja]] || [[word:chothajashasha|chothajashasha]] || [[word:chothajakaka|chothajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chothajatha|chothajatha]] || [[word:chothajaja|chothajaja]] || [[word:chothajasha|chothajasha]] || [[word:chothajaka|chothajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chothajafthaf|chothajafthaf]] || [[word:chothajafjaf|chothajafjaf]] || [[word:chothajafshaf|chothajafshaf]] || [[word:chothajafkaf|chothajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chothajasha|chothajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chothajshĂ«sha|chothajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chothajrosha|chothajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chothajmusha|chothajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chothajyasha|chothajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochothajnkshĂ«sha|gochothajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochothajnkrosha|gochothajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochothajnkmusha|gochothajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochothajnkyasha|gochothajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chothathajasha|chothathajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chothathajshĂ«sha|chothathajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chothathajrosha|chothathajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chothathajmusha|chothathajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chothathajyasha|chothathajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochothathajnkshĂ«sha|gochothathajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochothathajnkrosha|gochothathajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochothathajnkmusha|gochothathajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochothathajnkyasha|gochothathajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chethĂŠjasha|chethĂŠjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chethĂŠjshĂ«sha|chethĂŠjshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chethĂŠjrosha|chethĂŠjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chethĂŠjmusha|chethĂŠjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chethĂŠjyasha|chethĂŠjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochethĂŠjnkshĂ«sha|gochethĂŠjnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochethĂŠjnkrosha|gochethĂŠjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochethĂŠjnkmusha|gochethĂŠjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochethĂŠjnkyasha|gochethĂŠjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chothfajasha|chothfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chothfajshĂ«sha|chothfajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chothfajrosha|chothfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chothfajmusha|chothfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chothfajyasha|chothfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochothfajnkshĂ«sha|gochothfajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochothfajnkrosha|gochothfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochothfajnkmusha|gochothfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochothfajnkyasha|gochothfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
